name: af4-financecars
description: AF4 Cockpit · Vite SPA wrapper para deploy via turbo

scripts.deploy:cars: pnpm --filter @repo/cars-web build && pnpm dlx wrangler@latest deploy
scripts.deploy:lotoai: pnpm --filter @repo/lotoai-mobile build && pnpm dlx wrangler@latest deploy --config wrangler.lotoai.jsonc
scripts.deploy:lotoai:dry: pnpm --filter @repo/lotoai-mobile build && pnpm dlx wrangler@latest deploy --config wrangler.lotoai.jsonc --dry-run --outdir=.wrangler-dry
